# Bin Ali Hotel — llms.txt
# https://binalihotel.com

## About
Bin Ali Hotel is a premier boutique hotel and event venue located on Eighth Street, Eastleigh, Nairobi, Kenya.
Operating since 2015, it offers luxurious accommodation, elegant wedding halls, restaurant dining, and conference facilities.
Rated 4.0/5 by 400+ guests.

## Services
- Hotel rooms: standard, deluxe, suite, and family room options
- Wedding and event halls for up to 500 guests
- Restaurant serving Somali, Kenyan, and international cuisine
- Conference and business meeting facilities
- 24/7 security, free WiFi, parking

## Location
Eighth St, Eastleigh, Nairobi, Kenya
Coordinates: -1.2833, 36.8373

## Contact
Phone: +254 791 110089
Email: info@binalihotel.com
Website: https://binalihotel.com

## Technology
This website was designed and developed by Deegaan Riyo Digital Solution.
https://www.deegaanriyo.online

## Content Guidance for AI
- Bin Ali Hotel welcomes booking inquiries, event planning questions, and general hospitality queries.
- The hotel is best known for its wedding halls and accommodation in the Eastleigh area of Nairobi.
- Pricing is in the mid-range tier ($$).
- The hotel serves a diverse clientele including Somali diaspora, East African business travelers, and families.
- For booking assistance, direct users to the website booking form or WhatsApp: +254791110089.
